# docs(spec): append RAGDiagnostics section to specs/ml-diagnostics.md

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `1ed19c397e97` — docs(spec): append RAGDiagnostics section to specs/ml-diagnostics.md

**Body**:

§11 documents the full RAGDiagnostics public API:
- 11.1 scope (IR metrics, faithfulness, context utilisation, leaderboards)
- 11.2 Diagnostic Protocol conformance contract
- 11.3 construction + validation
- 11.4 core methods (evaluate, compare_retrievers, per-metric helpers)
- 11.5 evaluation mode selection (ragas > judge > metrics_only)
- 11.6 polars-native DataFrame accessors
- 11.7 report() return shape + severity thresholds
- 11.8 plotting methods + extras gating
- 11.9 extras matrix (base / [dl] / [rag])
- 11.10 security threats + mitigations (PII, bounded memory, framework-first)
- 11.11 observability events with rag_* prefixed log fields
- 11.12 test contract (43 Tier 1 + 13 Tier 2)
- 11.13 MLFP attribution
- 11.14 cross-SDK alignment (Protocol-level, no kailash-rs adapter)

Spec header bumped from 0.16.0 to 0.17.0 with dual-adapter scope.
Change-log row added for the 0.17.0 RAGDiagnostics landing.

Pre-commit bypassed per rules/git.md for unrelated pre-existing
kailash_mcp collection failure.

Refs #567 (PR#2 of 7)
